description:
fz: functional, immutable, set-theoretic-typed language with Elixir-flavored surface syntax and a Cranelift JIT backend. The tree-walking interpreter is kept permanently as the tier-0 evaluator for cold code (V8/HotSpot model).

See ~/.claude/projects/-Users-j5n-Workspace-fz/memory/project_fz_language.md for full design context.
title: Build fz language v1
